headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -99.2)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 2496% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 156 quotes and an overwhelming 132 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction.

• At 90.6, frustration levels remain well above the typical range though down from yesterday's peak of 113.8.

• Fears recovered significantly from yesterday's very low point, while optimism stayed in negative territory with mixed intensity levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
